title: SoundHound AI, Inc. (NASDAQ:SOUN) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: SoundHound AI reported Q4 2023 revenue of $17.1 million, representing 80% year-over-year growth. The company achieved full-year 2023 revenue of $45.9 million, aligning with initial guidance. The company missed on EPS, reporting -0.06 versus an expected -0.05. Gross margins improved significantly to 77.2% in Q4, up over 600 basis points annually. Adjusted EBITDA loss improved 80% year-over-year to negative $3.7 million. Operating loss improved 57% to $12.4 million. Cash position strengthened to approximately $109 million at year-end. SoundHound Chat AI became the first in-car voice assistant with generative AI capabilities deployed in production vehicles, starting with Stellantis brands across 18 countries. Restaurant technology expanded significantly through the SYNQ3 acquisition, adding major customers including Chipotle, Casey's, Applebee's, and Five Guys. Jersey Mike's deployed Smart Ordering across locations in Q4. Management projects 2024 revenue between $63-77 million with a $70 million midpoint, expecting Pillar 2 revenue to exceed 20% of total revenue.
